commentary.comment: GM is 10% - there is increase compared to so & so reasons
Increase in overheads due to freight by 5%
Increase by 7 lacs due to operational spend
increase of 66% in KMSCL, GMSCL, Unique, X-ray, Comission
due to legal costs increase of 50 lacs
no much R&D work compared to previous year
GM - 21% has been declined due to increse in casual labour charges
due to POCT production requirement CL number increased
Finance charges & Bank Charges is on higher side
Travelling Costs has been increased due to team travel of field staff
Marketing costs over and above the AOP limits
1. Admin costs within the AOP limits and 23% increase in CY compared with the staff welfare expenses & facility maintainance

1. IT Costs 8% decreased over the PY R&M IT Expenses 
2. Finance charges within AOP limits, 35% increase compared to PY finance charges
1. Corporate Recovery has been charged due to revision of corporate recovery policy, PY there wasn o corporate recovery provisioned
Overall operating expenses within AOP limits and 8% dropped compared with PY
